reviews.review_description: Great for distraction free workouts and it pairs well with the dynamic intensity!

reviews.review_title: A good quality free workout app
reviews.review_description: I am genuinely surprised to say that this app is amazing, I thought it would be a one time tutorial and then it would make you pay a monthly subscription. This is completely down ferment it has 3 different modes with great quality workouts for each one. I would recommend this app to anyone who wants to get in shape using vr.( One problem that could be resolved is to be optimized for a smaller boundary)

developer_response.body:
Hello mxmbx,

We are truly thrilled by your feedback and deeply appreciate every word! It’s incredibly rewarding to know you're enjoying the game, and we’re excited to share that we’re already planning new updates for this year.

Regarding your observation, our team will evaluate options to optimize the game further for smaller play boundaries. In the meantime, we’d like to mention a feature that might partially address this issue: you can reduce the "spawn area" of the projectiles by navigating to Settings → Bounds. We hope this helps improve your experience.

Thank you again for your support, and we hope you continue to have a great time playing!

reviews.review_description: I would love to try this game, but I can't get past the tutorial.  It keeps telling me to move right,  and even leaving the boundary isn't working. My kid who is much better at the VR can't figure it out either.

developer_response.body:
Hello PapBear645,

Thank you for your feedback, and we apologize for the delayed response. We're sorry to hear about the issue you experienced during the tutorial, and we completely understand how frustrating that must have been for you and your kid.

The good news is that we've identified and resolved this problem in our latest update, released today (01/13/25 - v0.30.0). We hope you'll give the game another try and enjoy the experience. If you do, we’d greatly appreciate it if you could update your review.

Should you encounter any further issues after the update, please don’t hesitate to reach out to us via our social media channels or contact email. We'll be more than happy to assist you.

Thank you for your patience and support!

reviews.review_description: Sadly all it does for me is say “logging”  I would really like to try this but I have tried many times but it just stays the same. Maybe it’s me as I am new to VR but I haven’t had a problem with anything else 😟

developer_response.body:
Hello, wocket.2024, thank you for your feedback!

We're very sorry to hear about the problems you've had with the game. 

We've just released a new version that solves exactly this problem you pointed out, so you should be able to log into the game and play it normally now! Thank you for your patience.

Stay healthy!

reviews.review_description:
Sorry , I did not have clear instructions in order to play this game properly. Please provide a tutorial prior to selecting item.. or even a basic overview.  Please add pounds and inches in the settings. 

My bats kept disappearing unless I keep my  hands on the trigger button.  Please make a way for the bats to stay put once you have selected them.  I was frustrated so I stop playing to give it a proper review. 

Thank you

developer_response.body:
Hello Bubbie64,

Thank you for taking the time to write this review. We sincerely apologize that you had a frustating time playing the game.
Your feedback is incredibly valuable to us. We've added your suggestions regarding clearer instructions, a tutorial, and the addition of pounds and inches to our to-do list and we hope to implement them in the next updates. As a very small team, we truly appreciate your patience and understanding as we work on these improvements.
We're also happy to inform you that the issue with needing to constantly press the trigger button to hold equipment has already been addressed in version 0.10.2. This means your equipment will now stay equipped without continuous button holding.

We would love to see you give the game another try once these updates and improvements are implemented.

reviews.review_description: I can tell this is going to be an amazing app. But for some reason I can't get past the tutorial where it says move to the right. I have tried so many times and nothing. Hopefully someone can guide me.

developer_response.body:
Hi EYowell,

We’re sorry to hear about the issue you encountered, and we truly appreciate your kind words in your feedback! Regarding the problem you mentioned, we’ve identified and resolved it in the latest update released today (01/13/25 - v0.30.0).

We hope you’ll give the game another try and enjoy it as intended. If you encounter any other issues after the update that prevent you from playing, please don’t hesitate to reach out to us through our social media channels or contact email. We’ll be happy to assist you.

Thank you once again for your feedback and support!

reviews.review_description: I've been playing this for a while and it's really good! There are so many options to choose from, and I have to say I get TIRED, I love having this as part of my exercise routine. I'm curious to see what the developers will bring to the game in the future

I really enjoy having this app in my fitness rotation. I focus on the boxing only, as I have bit of trouble with the bats connecting (it seems you must hit them by only a very small part of the bat)...but, the boxing, gets my heart rate nice and high, has me doing everything from deep side lunges, squats, and even torso twisting etc (with cross body punches)...leads me to believe that someone with good fitness knowledge may be part of the team. I love the small end of workout surprises, like the arcade running game. would LOVE to see more of these surprises added into the general routine. I find 20 minutes is my limit, because repeating the exact same five minute (ish) pattern gets a little boring, which is why i think it needs more surprise twists be thrown at you during the workout. would love to see more 30 minute workout options, so long as they have plenty of surprises. I think this app is, overall, a dinky, retro, cool must have...I can't wait to see what they turn this into! I am SO on board!

developer_response.body: Hello, Steviedeannz. Thank you very much for taking the time to write this review. We're glad you enjoyed your experience, as a small team, that means a lot to us! Your comments will be evaluated by our staff, so that we can continue to offer you more workouts, with many more surprises. Stay healthy!

reviews.review_description: I never got past the tutorial. I'm not sure if it was technical issues with the app or issues with my headset.  I was in tutorial but no targets were visible for me to hit. Looks like it would be a great app otherwise.

developer_response.body:
Hello LadyJ29,

We’re truly sorry to hear that your initial experience with the tutorial was frustrating. However, we’re delighted to see your follow-up feedback and to know that everything is working smoothly now, and you’re enjoying the game!

Your insight is incredibly valuable, and we’re committed to improving our tutorials to make them clearer for all players. If everything is now working as expected and you’re happy with the game, we kindly invite you to consider updating your rating. As a small team, each rating makes a big difference and helps us reach more players.

Thank you again for giving the game another shot and for sharing your thoughts. We hope you continue to enjoy the experience!

reviews.review_title: Good game but moves out of boundary
reviews.review_description:
Great game but it moves to the side way out of any boundary you set it. Even if you reset the boundary it sets up on the side.
   I hit my hand on furniture b/c it keeps shifting to the left side. Like the entire game & menu won't center. It's really an exciting game but other ppl told me it's a problem on their headset also. If it stayed in the boundary it'd be great

developer_response.body:
Hello JasmineLight! Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We’re thrilled to hear you’re enjoying the game, but we’re truly sorry to hear about the boundary issue you’re experiencing.

We recently released an update that includes the ability to adjust the game's spawn area so that it better aligns with your boundary setting, which can be found under the "Bounds" option in the settings panel. This should help resolve the issue you mentioned, but if the problem persists or if you notice anything else, please don’t hesitate to reach out with additional details or observations. We’d be more than happy to investigate further and ensure this is resolved for you and other players.

Thank you for your patience and support!

reviews.review_description:
Hello
I'm having problems logging on this happened after a updated

developer_response.body:
Hello, queenbee50470122,

First of all, thank you for taking the time to write this review, it means a lot to us!

We're very sorry you're having problems with the game, we understand how frustrating it must be.
Our team is aware of the problem you mentioned and we are already working on a solution to be released as soon as possible.

We appreciate your patience and understanding

-------------------------

UPDATE:
We've released a new version that fixes the problems you mentioned. You should now be able to play normally now!

If you're still having problems, please feel free to  contact us.

reviews.review_title: Great Workout but could be the BEST
reviews.review_description:
I love the game.  I like the punch workouts and don't use the bats or swords much.
One thing I would love to see is a way to disable the built in breaks.  I want to workout and find this ruins my flow!
Also would love to see longer workouts.  The longest punch workout is only 20 minutes and the the 360° workouts are only 2.5 minutes.
I am going to incorporate some wrist weights and probably a weight vest to get a better workout.
Keep on grinding!

developer_response.body:
Hey Mascman, thanks so much for your feedback! We're really glad you enjoyed the game, this means a lot to us! 
Rest assured that your suggestions will be evaluated by our team and we'll try to improve more and more! Stay healthy.

reviews.review_title: I so want to try this but........
reviews.review_description: I load it onto my Quest 3 and get to where it is suppose to load the workouts and it Sorry 1 star because it stays there with a spinning thing saying loading workouts. Even have it set to all workouts.  Once this kink is rsolved, I'll give it a try.

developer_response.body:
Hi MelissaBF,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We understand how frustrating it must be to encounter this unexpected error.
We sincerely apologize for the negative impact it had on your experience. Please know that we have identified the issue and the fix is already available on the version 0.10.2
We appreciate your patience and understanding.

If you continue to experience any issue while trying to play the game, feel free to contact us and we will do our best to help you.

reviews.review_title: Still needs a lot of work.
reviews.review_description:
The fundamental game mechanics are there. But the graphics still need to be updated and a voice actor would help.  Only a few of the balls in the hit back option bounced back when hit with the bat.

Consider hiring  someone with some boxing knowledge to create  boxing combinations that flow together.

The app has potential but still needs a lot of work  polishing up the gameplay.

developer_response.body:
Hello,

Thank you very much for your feedback! As the Beta version has just been released and we're improving the game, it's very important to hear what players bring to us. We've taken note of your feedback and added it to our development plan to keep evolving and improving over time.

 Let's have fun getting fit!
